title: SYNTHETIC disjoint-applicability FAR - district AAA
description: SYNTHETIC fixture (M4-T004 FH-2 negative control): same family + same output + same (null) window as syn-disjoint-bbb, but MUTUALLY EXCLUSIVE applicability (district AAA only). For any single set of inputs at most one of the pair is applicable, so they never compete -> NO conflict. This is the case a naive family-wide overlap guard would WRONGLY reject. Illustrative value; not a Verified determination.
